---
title: "using-taxis-functions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{using-taxis-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup}
library(ainara.martinez.m1ecap)
```

# Dataset
Le package fournit la base de données `taxis_reduit`

```{r}
head(taxis_reduit)
```
## Example: resumé groupé
```{r}
summarise_taxis_by_group(
  taxis_reduit,
  group_var = "payment",
  value_var = "total",
  stat = "mean"
)
```

## Example: plot

```{r}
plot_taxis_summary(
  taxis_reduit,
  group_var = "payment",
  value_var = "total",
  stat = "mean"
)
```
